events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Decision: **needs_more_info** — the crew's shortcut (sizing off a conductor's ampacity without confirming which temperature column/terminal rating applies) can't be verified as compliant because the submittal is missing the equipment listing page and project ampacity note required under NEC 110.14(C)/Table 310.16. Recommended holding the affected conductor work until that documentation is produced and re-verified, while unrelated rough-in activities can proceed.
